title: selago muralis
intro: Selago muralis, also known as blue-mantle or blue sparrow bush, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, providing health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and reduced inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
